title: Play GIF from URL/TF file/TF directory
description:
Feature: Play GIF from URL/TF file/TF directory
Scenario: PlayTFGif maps source type to file type correctly
Given a valid GifSource of type url, tf_file, or tf_directory
When play_gif is called
Then Device/PlayTFGif is sent with FileType 2, 0, or 1 respectively
